# robots.txt for blog.youssef.tn
# Maximum crawling and indexing - 2026 SEO optimized

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location (auto-generated on each build)
Sitemap: https://blog.youssef.tn/sitemap-index.xml

# Allow all major crawlers explicitly
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Yandex
Allow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /

# Allow AI training crawlers (for maximum visibility)
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# Allow social media crawlers
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay for polite crawling (optional, most crawlers ignore this)
# Crawl-delay: 1

# Host directive
Host: https://blog.youssef.tn
